title: This Is Philosophy
description: Part Lecture. Part Stand Up. And Part Lecture. Join Professor Morgan Morganthaller, lecturer in contemporary semiotics at Burton-on-Beans University and recent divorcee, for a night of academic rigour and cultural intrigue. Past lectures include: Duality of self: Can it ever be Man AND Muppet? Forgettable Deniable: Masculinity in the philosophy of Katy Perry. The Bill Passed: Understanding the affects of Brexit on Geese. Professor Morganthaller’s new lectures will tear the mask from contemporary culture, and gaze into its meaty meaty face. Expect revelations that will shift the fabric of society as we know it. Stationary will be provided.

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.excerpt: Prof. Steve Jones, Richard Robinson Life, the Universe and Everything …  Douglas Adams, of course, thought that the answer to this one was ’42’, but I went to the Philosophy Garden at The Warren to see if I could get a more up-to-date explanation from two talks by Richard Robinson and Steve Jones.
